header.title: Good morning, Felix

backgroundEffects: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/5 via-background to-primary/10
absolute top-0 right-0 w-64 h-64 sm:w-96 sm:h-96 bg-primary/20 rounded-full blur-3xl -translate-y-1/2 translate-x-1/3 group-hover:bg-primary/30

content.description: Generate tailored cover letters in seconds

header.title: Recent Documents
